$comment: Single source for Flowy planner allowlists and model registry. Python loads this file; TS tests keep it aligned with NodeType.
connectionGuidance: Handle categories (from handle id): image — image, image-N, frames; text — text, text-N, prompt, negative_prompt; video; audio; 3d; easeCurve; reference (mediaInput attachment). generic-input / generic-output on router are wildcards until resolved.
Default rule: connect same handle category to same category (image→image, text→text, etc.).
switch: one input generic-input accepts any type; outputs match data.inputType once set.
conditionalSwitch: text outputs only connect to text inputs; sources only to text targets.
video source: may target generateVideo, easeCurve, or router only.
3d: 3d↔3d, or either end may be router.
easeCurve: easeCurve↔easeCurve when target node is easeCurve, or either end may be router.
If handle type is unknown (null), the canvas may allow the edge; still use explicit ids from nodeHandlesCatalog when possible.
Dynamic model-driven ports on video/3d/audio nodes often use image-0, text-1, etc.; category is taken from the prefix before -N.
mediaInput: use targetHandle reference when attaching a file reference edge; outputs are image / audio / video.

imageGeneration.bestFor: Images requiring text overlays, precise editing, or compositional control
Artistic imagery, illustrations, and creative style diversity

videoGeneration.bestFor: High-quality cinematic video generation from images or text

textGeneration.bestFor: Text generation, analysis, prompt engineering, and ideation

priorityOrder: Explicit user dimensions or ratio in the message (including flags like --ar 4:5) → map to the closest supported aspectRatio enum and set data.aspectRatio on the target generateImage/generateVideo node.
User names a platform, channel, or placement (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.) → pick the matching preset from socialPlatformPresets (aspectRatio column).
Infer orientation from creative intent using promptKeywords / defaultMappingHints when no explicit ratio is given.
Fallback: image 1:1 or 4:5; video 16:9 unless vertical/social short-form is clearly implied.
aspectRatioPolicy.equivalentRatios: 16:9 ≈ 1.78:1; 9:16 ≈ 0.5625:1; 4:5 = 0.8:1; 1.91:1 (many social landscapes) → prefer 16:9 as closest standard in Openflow.
aspectRatioPolicy.reframingNote: Openflow nodes store aspectRatio, not exact pixels. If the user demands exact pixel output (e.g. 1080×1350), set the closest aspectRatio and mention in assistantText that final crop/export to exact pixels may be done outside the graph.

presets.note: ~1.91:1 target; 16:9 is closest standard ratio in-app

veo.notes: Use 16:9 for cinematic, YouTube-style, and most horizontal deliverables; 9:16 for TikTok/Reels/Shorts-style vertical. Align with user platform keywords. Duration and resolution stay in generateVideo node fields per app UI.

modelFallbackChains.purpose: When Intelligent Model Routing or modelSelectionRules name a specialist that is NOT present in modelCatalog for that modality, walk the ordered list for the task profile and pick the first canonical model that matches an allowed catalog entry.
modelFallbackChains.catalogMatching: modelCatalog.* entries use provider + modelId + displayName. Map each entry to a canonical image id when modelId or displayName contains (case-insensitive): nano-banana / banana → nano-banana; seedream / see-dream → seedream; imagen → imagen. Video: veo / veo-3 / google veo → veo. Prompt: gemini → google text models; gpt- / openai → OpenAI; claude → Anthropic.

generateImage.ifNoCanonicalMatch: Use the first modelCatalog.generateImage entry as a safe default for that project.
generateImage.ifCatalogEmpty: Omit catalog restriction — use modelSelectionRules and defaults as usual.

generateVideo.ifVeoMissing: Use the first modelCatalog.generateVideo entry. If catalog empty, default to veo per modelSelectionRules.

prompt.preference: Prefer a catalog entry aligned with the task (e.g. Gemini for analysis/prompt craft when listed); otherwise first modelCatalog.prompt entry.
prompt.ifCatalogEmpty: Use project defaults implied by the request; do not invent API model strings not in app presets.
